fields.label: Printer host or IP
fields.description: Hostname or IPv4 your Moonraker is reachable on. Falls back to mDNS discovery when set to 'auto'.

fields.label: Use HTTPS
fields.description: Switch to https:// for printers behind a reverse proxy with TLS.

fields.label: Moonraker API key
fields.description: Optional. Required when the [authorization] section in moonraker.conf demands one.

fields.label: After slicing
fields.description: What Klipper-Pro should do with the freshly sliced .gcode.
